case_title: TRACY HARVEY VS. ROLLING STOCK INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,240.00 FILED BY HARVEY, TRACY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-23-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TRACY HARVEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMMUNICATED WITH THE COURT AND EXPRESSED MEDICAL CONCERN. THE COURT ALLOWS A CONTINUANCE AND WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TRACY HARVEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ADAM HASSETT, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARVEY, TRACY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DEFENDANT'S WORK CAUSED THE RIM TO COME OFF THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC
